tickerText: [TENNIS] HSBC Championships (Queen's Club): Donna Vekic defeats Emma Raducanu 6-0, 7-6(6) to win the women's title; men's draw underway with Tommy Paul and Denis Shapovalov advancing • Boss Open (Stuttgart): Ben Shelton beats Taylor Fritz 6-4, 2-6, 6-4 for his first grass-court ATP title • [BADMINTON] SATHIO GROUP Australian Open (Sydney): Akane Yamaguchi wins women's singles; Indonesia's Alwi Farhan claims men's singles as the Super 500 event wraps June 14 • [SQUASH] PSA Squash Tour Finals (Paris, June 17-20): Top seeds Mostafa Asal and Amina Orfi lead the men's and women's draws at Centquatre-Paris with $710,000 on the line • [PICKLEBALL] MLP 2026: New Jersey 5s (Anna Leigh Waters) win MLP Austin for their 12th straight victory; league heads to St. Petersburg, FL (June 17-21) • [TABLE TENNIS] WTT Youth Contender Helsingborg: Kazakhstan's Alan Kurmangaliyev wins U19 boys' singles gold; ITTF World Team Championships London 2026 centenary edition saw China sweep both team titles in May

newsItems.title: Vekic Stuns Raducanu for Queen's Title; Shelton Wins Stuttgart
newsItems.excerpt: Donna Vekic captured the HSBC Championships women's title at Queen's Club, defeating Emma Raducanu 6-0, 7-6(6) in the final. On the grass courts of Stuttgart, Ben Shelton claimed his first ATP grass-court title by beating Taylor Fritz in three sets.

newsItems.title: Yamaguchi and Farhan Crowned at Australian Open
newsItems.excerpt: Japan's Akane Yamaguchi won the women's singles title and Indonesia's Alwi Farhan took men's singles at the SATHIO GROUP Australian Badminton Open in Sydney, capping the BWF Super 500 event with Chinese doubles pairs sweeping the remaining titles.

newsItems.title: PSA Squash Tour Finals Set for Paris Showdown
newsItems.excerpt: The season-ending PSA Squash Tour Finals begin June 17 at Centquatre-Paris, featuring world champions Mostafa Asal and teenage sensation Amina Orfi as top seeds. Paul Coll, Nour El Sherbini, and Hania El Hammamy headline an elite eight-player field in each draw.

newsItems.title: New Jersey 5s Extend Win Streak; MLP Heads to St. Pete
newsItems.excerpt: Anna Leigh Waters and the New Jersey 5s captured MLP Austin with a 3-1 win over Columbus for their 12th consecutive victory of 2026. Major League Pickleball moves to St. Petersburg, Florida (June 17-21) for its next regular-season stop.

newsItems.title: Kurmangaliyev Wins WTT Youth Gold; China Sweeps London Teams
newsItems.excerpt: Kazakhstan's Alan Kurmangaliyev claimed U19 boys' singles gold at the WTT Youth Contender Helsingborg. China's men's and women's teams both defended their titles at the ITTF World Team Table Tennis Championships Finals in London earlier this spring.
